mapper.sql: ROrderNo, ROrderItem, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, DlvDate, DlvType, RcvClassify, StockCode, OrdTransType, SpecOfferNo, CProductNo, Discount, SpecMark, ProdFlag, ExpInvCode, Dept_Dlvdate, Cust_Dlvdate, OptCode, OptState, OptDate, Operator, Opttime, Remark, DlvAddress, AgentSalesPrice, StockCustomerNo, ShipDate, ExpDlvType, DlvAddressId, EPrice, TaxRate, NTaxAmount, ExpTime, ReadyTime, OwnerCode, DetailMark, SignTime
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from dbo._rcvdetail_gz
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from dbo._rcvdetail_gz
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._rcvdetail_gz (ROrderNo, ROrderItem, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, DlvDate, DlvType, RcvClassify, StockCode, OrdTransType, SpecOfferNo, CProductNo, Discount, SpecMark, ProdFlag, ExpInvCode, Dept_Dlvdate, Cust_Dlvdate, OptCode, OptState, OptDate, Operator, Opttime, Remark, DlvAddress, AgentSalesPrice, StockCustomerNo, ShipDate, ExpDlvType, DlvAddressId, EPrice, TaxRate, NTaxAmount, ExpTime, ReadyTime, OwnerCode, DetailMark, SignTime, OptRecord, RV) values (#{rorderno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{rorderitem,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{rcvclassify,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{ordtranstype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{specofferno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cproductno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{discount,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{specmark,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{expinvcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{custDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{optcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{optstate,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{agentsalesprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{stockcustomerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expdlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dlvaddressid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxrate,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ntaxamount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{exptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{readytime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ownercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detailmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{optrecord,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{rv,jdbcType=BINARY})

mapper.update:
update dbo._rcvdetail_gz
ROrderNo = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=CHAR},
ROrderItem = #{record.rorderitem,jdbcType=CHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price = #{record.price,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DlvDate = #{record.dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvType = #{record.dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
RcvClassify = #{record.rcvclassify,jdbcType=CHAR},
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
OrdTransType = #{record.ordtranstype,jdbcType=CHAR},
SpecOfferNo = #{record.specofferno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CProductNo = #{record.cproductno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
SpecMark = #{record.specmark,jdbcType=CHAR},
ProdFlag = #{record.prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
ExpInvCode = #{record.expinvcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Dept_Dlvdate = #{record.deptDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Cust_Dlvdate = #{record.custDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptState = #{record.optstate,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptDate = #{record.optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Operator = #{record.operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Opttime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvAddress = #{record.dlvaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
AgentSalesPrice = #{record.agentsalesprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
StockCustomerNo = #{record.stockcustomerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ShipDate = #{record.shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ExpDlvType = #{record.expdlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DlvAddressId = #{record.dlvaddressid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EPrice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TaxRate = #{record.taxrate,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
NTaxAmount = #{record.ntaxamount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ExpTime = #{record.exptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ReadyTime = #{record.readytime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OwnerCode = #{record.ownercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DetailMark = #{record.detailmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SignTime = #{record.signtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OptRecord = #{record.optrecord,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
RV = #{record.rv,jdbcType=BINARY},
